tasks.subject: Task 0: Drizzle migrations — drop legacy tables, add agentAccess
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mutate the production schema to the terminal state in two atomic migrations.

**Files:**
- Create: apps/server/libs/database/migrations/<timestamp>_add_skills_agent_access.sql
- Create: apps/server/libs/database/migrations/<timestamp>_drop_skill_versions_skill_files.sql
- Modify: apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/skill/skills.ts
- Modify: apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/skill/index.ts
- Modify: apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/skill/relations.ts
- Delete: apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/skill/skill-versions.ts
- Delete: apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/skill/skill-files.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter @team9/database typecheck && pnpm db:generate -- --check

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/skill/skills.ts","apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/skill/index.ts","apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/skill/relations.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @team9/database typecheck && pnpm db:generate -- --check","acceptanceCriteria":["skill__agent_access enum exists","skills.agentAccess column NOT NULL default 'read'","skill_versions and skill_files tables dropped","skill_version__status enum dropped","skills.currentVersion column dropped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: SkillsService refactor — drop legacy methods, plumb agentAccess
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Strip every reference to skill_versions/skill_files/currentVersion out of SkillsService, accept and persist agentAccess on create/update/list/getById.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/skills.service.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/dto/create-skill.dto.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/dto/update-skill.dto.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/dto/index.ts
- Delete: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/dto/create-version.dto.ts
- Delete: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/dto/review-version.dto.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/skills.service.spec.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter gateway test src/skills/skills.service.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/skills.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/dto/create-skill.dto.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/dto/update-skill.dto.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter gateway test src/skills/skills.service.spec.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["listVersions/getVersion/createVersion/reviewVersion gone","create accepts agentAccess with caller default","update accepts and persists agentAccess","getById drops files field"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: SkillsController — drop version routes, surface agentAccess
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove the four version routes from SkillsController and verify CRUD continues to compile and pass.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/skills.controller.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/skills.controller.spec.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter gateway test src/skills/skills.controller.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/skills.controller.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter gateway test src/skills/skills.controller.spec.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["no version routes remain","POST /v1/skills passes agentAccess default 'read' to service"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: resolveSkillAgentAccess helper service
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Centralize the per-(skill, bot) access decision in one helper so both the bot controller and the folder-token branch call the same code path.

**Files:**
- Create: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/agent-access.service.ts
- Create: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/agent-access.service.spec.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter gateway test src/skills/agent-access.service.spec.ts

{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/agent-access.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/skills.module.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter gateway test src/skills/agent-access.service.spec.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["resolve returns per-skill default","missing or cross-tenant skill returns 'none'","signature accepts botUserId for v2 override hook"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: BotSkillsController — agent-facing /v1/bot/skills
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose four agent-facing endpoints under /v1/bot/skills with the agentAccess !== 'none' filter and 'write' default for create.

**Files:**
- Create: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/bot-skills.controller.ts
- Create: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/bot-skills.controller.spec.ts

- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/skills/skills.module.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter gateway test src/skills/bot-skills.controller.spec.ts

```

tasks.subject: Task 5: 'workspace.skill' logicalKey on /v1/bot/folder-token
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 'workspace.skill' to Team9LogicalMountKey + KNOWN_LOGICAL_KEYS and apply the agentAccess matrix when minting tokens.

**Files:**
- Modify (agent-pi): packages/claw-hive-types/src/just-bash-team9-workspace.ts
- Modify (gateway): apps/server/apps/gateway/src/folder9/folder-token.service.ts
- Modify (gateway): apps/server/apps/gateway/src/folder9/folder-token.service.spec.ts
- Modify (gateway): apps/server/apps/gateway/src/folder9/folder9.module.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter gateway test src/folder9/folder-token.service.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/folder9/folder-token.service.ts","../team9-agent-pi/packages/claw-hive-types/src/just-bash-team9-workspace.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter gateway test src/folder9/folder-token.service.spec.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["Team9LogicalMountKey includes 'workspace.skill'","folderId verified against skills.folderId in tenant","matrix: 'none'->403, 'read'+write->403, otherwise mint","propose/admin permissions rejected for workspace.skill"]}
```
